item.title: Festival of Endless Gratitude 2025 is over 💜 A huge thank you to everyone who co...
item.description:
@endlessgratitude

Festival of Endless Gratitude 2025 is over 💜

A huge thank you to everyone who contributed and made it all special. We’re filled to the brim with gratitude for your support to bring this year’s edition to life.

THANK YOU to every single artist who participated with their beautiful work; every single volunteer who contributed with their time and energy; every single guest who chose to spend the weekend with us; and all of our collaborators.

We hope to see you all again next year.

Demeters Döttrar (SE/DK) ≋ KMRU (KE) ≋ Heidemann / Klint / Mingot (DK/US) ≋ Copenhagen Clarinet Choir & Anders Lauge Meldgaard (INT) ≋ Kathryn Mohr (US) ≋ ALMA LAPILLI (STILL, Cardone, Barbaro) (IT) ≋ Elvin Brandhi (UK) ≋ Norm Dogs (DK/ES) Finlay Shakespeare (UK) ≋ Ian Nagoski (US) ≋ Camille Helt Haarder (DK) ≋ The Shadow Ring (UK) ≋ G•Bop Orchestra performs The Scott Walker Songbook (INT) ≋ Polonius (EG/FR) ≋ Josie (DK) ≋ Vio Lino & Tettix Hexer (IT/DK) ≋ B612 (DK/UK) ≋ Lazaara Ilieva (US) ≋ vMX-8P (DK) ≋ Vera Jansson (DK) ≋ HakkertDukkert (DK)

@idaskibsted ≋ @totally_divine_ ≋ @_kamaru_ ≋ @plain_bob_minor ≋ @minais_b ≋ @copenhagenclarinetchoir ≋ @anders_lauge_meldgaard ≋ @carolyngoodwinmusic ≋ @mariadybbroe ≋ @kathryn__mohr ≋ @stillagramstill ≋ @ilcardonesonoro ≋ @romeobarbarotammorra ≋ @elvinbrandhi ≋ @normdogs ≋ @finlayshakespeare ≋ @canaryrecords ≋ @muchmorestellarthanthenightsky ≋ @graham_lambkin ≋ @timothygoss46 ≋ @gretaeacottcomposer ≋ @one_take_records ≋ @thorakidonjaeger ≋ @victorkassebeer ≋ @hassebruun.exe ≋ @szymonpimpon @world.polonius ≋ @josiebandcph ≋ @vio_lino_o ≋ @runerisager ≋ @megastorhest ≋ @ve.rajansson ≋ @oliviabrixx ≋ @lukaskeysell ≋ @b612group ≋ @hakkertdukkert ≋ @topolin3_island

DJs, book publishers & food
@afvikling_kassetter ≋ @lucky.goldstar ≋ @urbansquire ≋ @sidsteaarhundrede ≋ @moellegadesboghandel ≋ @eschoforlag ≋ @torupspisehus

FOEG2025 was made possible with the generous support from:

@kildevaeld_kulturcenter ≋ Østerbro Lokaludvalg (@vi_er_oesterbro) ≋ Københavns Kommunes Musikudvalg ≋ @statenskunstfond ≋ Alice CPH (@alice_nbro) ≋ @artmusicdenmark ≋ @musikforeningenrusk

📷 by Morten Aagaard (@bokehmia) & Loukia Maritsa (@loukia_mar)
item.content:encoded:
@endlessgratitude

Festival of Endless Gratitude 2025 is over 💜

A huge thank you to everyone who contributed and made it all special. We’re filled to the brim with gratitude for your support to bring this year’s edition to life.

THANK YOU to every single artist who participated with their beautiful work; every single volunteer who contributed with their time and energy; every single guest who chose to spend the weekend with us; and all of our collaborators.

We hope to see you all again next year.

Demeters Döttrar (SE/DK) ≋ KMRU (KE) ≋ Heidemann / Klint / Mingot (DK/US) ≋ Copenhagen Clarinet Choir & Anders Lauge Meldgaard (INT) ≋ Kathryn Mohr (US) ≋ ALMA LAPILLI (STILL, Cardone, Barbaro) (IT) ≋ Elvin Brandhi (UK) ≋ Norm Dogs (DK/ES) Finlay Shakespeare (UK) ≋ Ian Nagoski (US) ≋ Camille Helt Haarder (DK) ≋ The Shadow Ring (UK) ≋ G•Bop Orchestra performs The Scott Walker Songbook (INT) ≋ Polonius (EG/FR) ≋ Josie (DK) ≋ Vio Lino & Tettix Hexer (IT/DK) ≋ B612 (DK/UK) ≋ Lazaara Ilieva (US) ≋ vMX-8P (DK) ≋ Vera Jansson (DK) ≋ HakkertDukkert (DK)

@idaskibsted ≋ @totally_divine_ ≋ @_kamaru_ ≋ @plain_bob_minor ≋ @minais_b ≋ @copenhagenclarinetchoir ≋ @anders_lauge_meldgaard ≋ @carolyngoodwinmusic ≋ @mariadybbroe ≋ @kathryn__mohr ≋ @stillagramstill ≋ @ilcardonesonoro ≋ @romeobarbarotammorra ≋ @elvinbrandhi ≋ @normdogs ≋ @finlayshakespeare ≋ @canaryrecords ≋ @muchmorestellarthanthenightsky ≋ @graham_lambkin ≋ @timothygoss46 ≋ @gretaeacottcomposer ≋ @one_take_records ≋ @thorakidonjaeger ≋ @victorkassebeer ≋ @hassebruun.exe ≋ @szymonpimpon @world.polonius ≋ @josiebandcph ≋ @vio_lino_o ≋ @runerisager ≋ @megastorhest ≋ @ve.rajansson ≋ @oliviabrixx ≋ @lukaskeysell ≋ @b612group ≋ @hakkertdukkert ≋ @topolin3_island

DJs, book publishers & food
@afvikling_kassetter ≋ @lucky.goldstar ≋ @urbansquire ≋ @sidsteaarhundrede ≋ @moellegadesboghandel ≋ @eschoforlag ≋ @torupspisehus

FOEG2025 was made possible with the generous support from:

@kildevaeld_kulturcenter ≋ Østerbro Lokaludvalg (@vi_er_oesterbro) ≋ Københavns Kommunes Musikudvalg ≋ @statenskunstfond ≋ Alice CPH (@alice_nbro) ≋ @artmusicdenmark ≋ @musikforeningenrusk

📷 by Morten Aagaard (@bokehmia) & Loukia Maritsa (@loukia_mar)
item.author: endlessgratitude

item.title: Full lineup and day schedule for FOEG 2025 is ready! 𝐓𝐇𝐔𝐑𝐒𝐃𝐀𝐘 𝟐𝟎/𝟏𝟏 DEMETERS DÖT...
item.description:
@endlessgratitude

Full lineup and day schedule for FOEG 2025 is ready!

𝐓𝐇𝐔𝐑𝐒𝐃𝐀𝐘 𝟐𝟎/𝟏𝟏
DEMETERS DÖTTRAR (SE/DK)
KMRU (KE)
HEIDEMANN/KLINT/MINGOT (DK)

𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐃𝐀𝐘 𝟐𝟏/𝟏𝟏
COPENHAGEN CLARINET CHOIR & ANDERS LAUGE MELDGAARD (INT)
KATHRYN MOHR (US)
ALMA LAPILLI (STILL, CARDONE, BARBARO) (IT)
ELVIN BRANDHI (UK)
NORM DOGS (DK/ES)
FINLAY SHAKESPEARE (UK)

𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐃𝐀𝐘 𝟐𝟐/𝟏𝟏
IAN NAGOSKI (US)
CAMILLE HELT HAARDER (DK)
THE SHADOW RING (UK)
G•BOP ORCHESTRA PERFORMS THE SCOTT WALKER SONGBOOK (INT)
POLONIUS (EG/FR)
JOSIE (DK)
VIO LINO & TETTIX HEXER (IT/DK)

Partout tickets and one-day tickets are now available via link in bio.

@idaskibsted ≋ @totally_divine_ ≋ @discreetmusic.gbg ≋ @_kamaru_ ≋ @_anyines ≋ @plain_bob_minor ≋ @minais_b ≋ @copenhagenclarinetchoir ≋ @anders_lauge_meldgaard ≋ @carolyngoodwinmusic ≋ @kathryn__mohr ≋ @stillagramstill ≋ @elvinbrandhi ≋ @normdogs ≋ @finlayshakespeare ≋ @canaryrecords ≋ @muchmorestellarthanthenightsky ≋ @graham_lambkin ≋ @timothygoss46 ≋ @one_take_records ≋ @world.polonius ≋ @josiebandcph ≋ @vio_lino_o ≋ @megastorhest
item.content:encoded:
@endlessgratitude

Full lineup and day schedule for FOEG 2025 is ready!

𝐓𝐇𝐔𝐑𝐒𝐃𝐀𝐘 𝟐𝟎/𝟏𝟏
DEMETERS DÖTTRAR (SE/DK)
KMRU (KE)
HEIDEMANN/KLINT/MINGOT (DK)

𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐃𝐀𝐘 𝟐𝟏/𝟏𝟏
COPENHAGEN CLARINET CHOIR & ANDERS LAUGE MELDGAARD (INT)
KATHRYN MOHR (US)
ALMA LAPILLI (STILL, CARDONE, BARBARO) (IT)
ELVIN BRANDHI (UK)
NORM DOGS (DK/ES)
FINLAY SHAKESPEARE (UK)

𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐃𝐀𝐘 𝟐𝟐/𝟏𝟏
IAN NAGOSKI (US)
CAMILLE HELT HAARDER (DK)
THE SHADOW RING (UK)
G•BOP ORCHESTRA PERFORMS THE SCOTT WALKER SONGBOOK (INT)
POLONIUS (EG/FR)
JOSIE (DK)
VIO LINO & TETTIX HEXER (IT/DK)

Partout tickets and one-day tickets are now available via link in bio.

@idaskibsted ≋ @totally_divine_ ≋ @discreetmusic.gbg ≋ @_kamaru_ ≋ @_anyines ≋ @plain_bob_minor ≋ @minais_b ≋ @copenhagenclarinetchoir ≋ @anders_lauge_meldgaard ≋ @carolyngoodwinmusic ≋ @kathryn__mohr ≋ @stillagramstill ≋ @elvinbrandhi ≋ @normdogs ≋ @finlayshakespeare ≋ @canaryrecords ≋ @muchmorestellarthanthenightsky ≋ @graham_lambkin ≋ @timothygoss46 ≋ @one_take_records ≋ @world.polonius ≋ @josiebandcph ≋ @vio_lino_o ≋ @megastorhest
item.author: endlessgratitude

item.title: We are very excited to announce ≋ 𝐅𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐚𝐥 𝐨𝐟 𝐄𝐧𝐝𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐆𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟓 ≋ The festi...
item.description:
@endlessgratitude

We are very excited to announce
≋ 𝐅𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐚𝐥 𝐨𝐟 𝐄𝐧𝐝𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐆𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟓 ≋

The festival will take place November 20-22nd.

3-day passes for sale now | 𝐿𝑖𝑛𝑘 𝑖𝑛 𝑏𝑖𝑜

Artwork and identity by: @federico.spini
item.content:encoded:
@endlessgratitude

We are very excited to announce
≋ 𝐅𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐚𝐥 𝐨𝐟 𝐄𝐧𝐝𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐆𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟓 ≋

The festival will take place November 20-22nd.

3-day passes for sale now | 𝐿𝑖𝑛𝑘 𝑖𝑛 𝑏𝑖𝑜

Artwork and identity by: @federico.spini
item.author: endlessgratitude
